title: vote.received / vote.validated event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10. Produced by epd2_voting_service.events.vote_envelope_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_vote_received_event (vote.received) and build_vote_validated_event (vote.validated) - verified by reading events.py, both call the shared private _build_vote_event helper with the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes encrypted_or_encoded_choice from the wire event (only integrity_hash, already a one-way digest, travels) - see vote_envelope_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot. additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing vote-linkability control (CT-00-09, canon section 15.3's 'Запрет'): account_id, person_id, identity_record_id, full_name, email, membership_id, and identity_provider_reference are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema.
